topic: My house keys are warm on their hook every morning, as if just used.
title: My House Keys Are Warm Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my house keys are warm on their hook.
scenes.image_prompt: A set of metal keys hanging on a small wall hook by a door, dim hallway light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I rent the bottom floor of an old brick house.
scenes.image_prompt: An old brick house exterior at dawn, lower windows dark, fog along the ground, muted color, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I hang those keys the same way each night.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand hanging keys on a hook beside a coat rack, warm low lamp glow, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning they were warm, like they had just been held.
scenes.image_prompt: Close view of keys on a hook catching faint light, slight blur, cold dim room behind, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
A locked deadbolt on a door from inside, dim hallway, thin slice of light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I marked the keys with chalk before bed and checked at dawn.
scenes.image_prompt: Keys with a faint chalk mark resting on a dark table, lamp light, grainy texture, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the chalk was smudged into a fingerprint.
scenes.image_prompt: A smudged chalky fingerprint on a metal key surface, harsh side light, shallow focus, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every dawn after, the warmth returned, the chalk gone.
scenes.image_prompt: Bare clean keys hanging on a hook, soft window light, dust drifting, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started finding mud tracked across my kitchen floor.
scenes.image_prompt: Faint muddy footprints across pale kitchen tiles, early grey light, deep shadow near cabinets, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The tracks led from the door to my bedside, then back.
scenes.image_prompt: A trail of dark prints crossing a wooden bedroom floor toward an unmade bed, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I changed the locks twice. The keys stayed warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A new brass lock cylinder on a door, packaging nearby, cold workshop light, heavy shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning a second set of keys hung beside mine.
scenes.image_prompt: Two sets of keys hanging on adjacent hooks, the second unfamiliar, dim hallway, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing
